ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "team_short_name" TEXT /* Short name or abbreviation of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach for the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the coach was hired */,
  "previous_club" TEXT /* Previous club the coach worked for */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the coach's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the game is played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee for the game */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., 'scheduled', 'in progress', 'completed') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game outcome */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "winning_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "losing_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the losing team */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the game went into overtime */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the game involved penalties */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the game outcome (e.g., key moments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_outcomes_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_outcomes_losing_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("losing_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_outcomes_winning_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("winning_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the team */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties for the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points for the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Difference between goals for and goals against */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of games where the team did not concede any goals */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the team */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team standing */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current rank of the team */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the team */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties for the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points for the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Difference between goals for and goals against */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of games where the team did not concede any goals */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the team */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., 'administrator', 'coach', 'analyst') */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., 'active', 'inactive') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
